"TKG"={ #Tokugawa Shogunate
	country="TKG"
	356 = { #Shogun at start
		# [#329 boot-test / Bug5] REPURPOSED from Tokugawa Ienari (b.1773, UNBORN in 1763) to the
		# ACTUAL reigning shogun on 1763.2.16: TOKUGAWA IEHARU (家治), 10th shogun, r.1760-1786, age 26.
		# Previously this block had NO set_as_ruler (Ienari was unborn), so the engine auto-picked a
		# period-INAPPROPRIATE shogun from history — the "Tokugawa Yoshinobu" (the LAST shogun, 1866)
		# the boot test showed. We now seat Ieharu explicitly. He carries NO death_date (a setup ruler
		# with a death_date is read as already-dead — see RUS char:144); natural death is handled by
		# the age system, after which the engine's succession seats the historical successors.
		# Reused char:356 (a known in-range TKG id) rather than a new id, to avoid the setup ID-range
		# rule ("should have id N") that leaves a higher-numbered new char uncreated.
		first_name="Ieharu"
		family_name="Tokugawa"
		family="c:TKG.fam:Tokugawa"
		birth_date=1737.06.20
		culture="japanese"
		religion="shinto"
		no_stats=yes
		no_traits=yes
		c:TKG={
			set_as_ruler=char:356
		}
		# DNA retained as a neutral period-Tokugawa portrait placeholder.
		dna=""
	}
	459 = { #Emperor at start
		first_name="Kokaku"
		family_name="Yamato"
		family="c:TKG.fam:Yamato"
		birth_date=1771.09.23
		culture="japanese"
		religion="shinto"
		no_stats=yes
		no_traits=yes
		dna=""
	}
	460 = { #Emperor's heir
		first_name="Ayahito"
		family_name="Yamato"
		family="c:TKG.fam:Yamato"
		birth_date=1800.03.16
		culture="japanese"
		religion="shinto"
		father="char:459"
		no_stats=yes
		no_traits=yes
		dna=""
	}
}
